headline: Sempra Weighs LNG Growth And Grid Spending Against Valuation Concerns
summary: Sempra is advancing LNG export projects, including ECA LNG Phase 1 in Mexico and Port Arthur LNG Phase 1 in Texas, as part of its current development pipeline. The company is directing substantial capital toward North American transmission and distribution upgrades to support rising electricity demand. These efforts align with a focus on grid reliability and an expanded renewable portfolio as data center and AI driven power needs increase. For investors watching NYSE:SRE, the mix of LNG...
